title: Artan'sProjectCoreMod
description: This mod is a library mod that is a prerequisite for other mods.
body:
This mod is a prerequisite mod for a mod to be developed primarily by artanjp.

This mod will allow you to easily define flowers, crops, and decoration blocks.

Adding a flower creates a flower item and a flower block.
Adding a crop creates a seed block and a crop block.
By adding decoration blocks, you create half blocks, stairs, fences, buttons, pressure sensitive plates, and tiles.

Tiles are blocks that have almost the same function as wool. However, they require a pickaxe to retrieve.
